title: Need help with initial setup for a small CPG company
excerpt: New to Monday.com having issues with laying out our workflows, need someone to help with set up.

posts.author: jthmp8892 (Jeff Thompson)
posts.cookedHtml: New to Monday.com having issues with laying out our workflows, need someone to help with set up.

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jthmp8892 and welcome to the monday.com community forums.

There is a lot of ways that partners can help and it truly all depends on what sort of support and assistance you are looking for. CarbonWeb is a Channel Partner with monday.com and we work with members of the community every day to consult on the platform while also developing custom solutions. We also are pushing more end-to-end solutions through the Suites we are creating and have started with the CarbonCRM Suite.

If you want to start with a baseline consultation please schedule something here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jthmp8892 - you have come to the right place. We would be happy to have a look at your current setups and see how we can be of assistance to get you up and running with a perfect solution tailored just for you.

Feel free to book a complementary discover session here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting or reach out to us directly at info@greenllamas.com.

Also, check us out online to learn more about what we do!

Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jthmp8892 ,

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialize in integrations and custom requirements. There are a few things that spring to mind I’d love to show you, as well as many questions to ask! Let’s connect.

Please feel free to return by email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to meet with you and better understand your objectives at each level.

Meet with Peta

If you’re based in Europe/USA, please use this link for more accommodating meeting times: international clients - special hours

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jthmp8892 !

Choosing monday. com as your workflow management software is a commendable decision! By creating personalized workflows on monday com, you can streamline many business processes as efficiently as possible. In short, workflow creation helps you automate repetitive tasks and save your team time. With visual workflows, you can also keep track of team members, visualize budget KPIs, understand when and how to allocate resources, and more.

If you’re looking to implement workflows using monday. com, it is effective to hire consultants from the right monday consulting company. With deep technical expertise, consultants can build customized workflows, streamline processes, and enhance agility.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
